\centry{Independent Consultant}{Data and Strategy Consultant}{Remote}{January 2020 -- August 2021}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Delivered analytics and market research engagements for three early-stage startups, providing actionable insights on customer segmentation, funnel performance, and unit economics
  \item Built financial models and investor-facing slide decks supporting two seed-round fundraises totaling \$4.2M
\end{itemize}
